name: VS Code + GitHub Copilot
tagline: The most popular editor with AI superpowers
ai_features: Inline completions, Copilot Chat, multi-file edits (Edits mode), agent mode with MCP support, voice coding

name: Cursor
ai_features: Inline edit (Cmd+K), multi-file context (Composer), agent mode, codebase-aware chat, auto-debug, natural language terminal

name: Windsurf
ai_features: Cascade agent (multi-step autonomous tasks), inline AI, deep codebase understanding, real-time collaboration awareness

name: Zed
tagline: High-performance multiplayer code editor with AI
ai_features: Inline AI transformations, assistant panel (chat), supports Claude/OpenAI/local models, fast GPU-rendered UI
pricing: Free (editor) · AI features may require credits

name: JetBrains AI
tagline: AI assistant built into all JetBrains IDEs
ai_features: Inline code completion, AI chat, test generation, code explanation, refactoring suggestions, commit message generation

name: Replit
tagline: Build software with AI in the browser
ai_features: AI agent builds full apps from prompts, Replit AI for completions and chat, instant deployment, no local setup needed

name: Devin
ai_features: Fully autonomous software engineering agent, can browse web, write and run code, file GitHub PRs, debug end-to-end

name: Void
ai_features: Inline AI edits, multi-file agent, supports any LLM provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, local Ollama), privacy-first
